title: Hiring through the Administration
content: The Administration shall recruit and place workers primarily on government-to-government arrangements and shall service the hiring of foreign government instrumentalities. It shall also recruit and place workers for foreign employers in sectors as dictated by policy. The Administration shall administer programs supporting employment development objectives; set parameters for servicing other foreign clients; and coordinate with POEA Regional Centers, Department of Labor and Employment Regional Offices, and local government units to conduct organized recruitment activities in provinces to aid government employment dispersal efforts.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Full Text.pdf
